overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sunlit futuristic city street in a desert climate. The scene features industrial structures, modern skyscrapers, digital billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside commercial building with large digital billboards

events.description: pedestrian in cowboy hat passes close to camera from right to left
child ahead transitions from walking to running

agents.ego_description: following a child character along the sidewalk, maintaining steady pace behind them

notable_agents.action: child in red clothing running ahead along the sidewalk
man in cowboy hat walking past camera from right to left

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial structure with hexagonal pattern and graffiti
large illuminated advertising screens mounted on building facade
multi-level highway overpass structure spanning across the background
tall futuristic skyscraper with grid-like window pattern

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view following a child running along a sunlit sidewalk. A pedestrian in a cowboy hat passes by closely. To the left stands a massive industrial cooling tower, while the right side features a building with large digital billboards. An elevated highway is visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with multi-lane traffic and palm tree landscaping

events.description: camera shifts to reveal player character from behind, establishing third-person perspective
pink futuristic sports car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: player character visible from behind wearing a vest and red pants, walking steadily along sidewalk

notable_agents.action: child in red clothing continuing to run ahead along the sidewalk
pink sports car driving past at moderate speed

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street median
futuristic street lamps with horizontal orange light bars

segments.scene_description: The player character becomes visible from behind as they continue walking. A pink sports car passes by on the street. The industrial cooling tower looms larger on the left while palm trees and modern street lights line the path. The child continues running ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection approach with mixed pedestrian and vehicle traffic

events.description: green van and multiple cars pass by on the street
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking alongside other pedestrians with increased vehicle traffic nearby

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and cap walking alongside the player
green van stopped at traffic light

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red light
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the road
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Traffic density increases with various vehicles including a green van passing by. The player walks alongside other pedestrians approaching an intersection. A traffic light and crosswalk become visible ahead. The industrial cooling tower is now behind while a graffiti-covered wall appears on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: inclined sidewalk ramp with graffiti walls leading upward

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green
begin ascending the inclined ramp, changing elevation

agents.ego_description: walking up an inclined concrete ramp, leaving the main street level behind

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red clothing walking down the ramp in opposite direction

entered.detail: steeply inclined concrete walkway with red painted curbs
cars parked along the side of the ramp
industrial metal staircase attached to building facade

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the intersection as the traffic light turns green, then turns right to ascend a steep concrete ramp. The ramp features extensive graffiti on the right wall and parked vehicles on the left. The environment becomes more enclosed as the character climbs away from the main street level, with industrial structures visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit futuristic street that transitions from an open industrial thoroughfare to an enclosed concrete ascent. It begins by following a child running past a pedestrian in a cowboy hat, with a massive industrial cooling tower on the left and digital billboards on the right under a clear blue sky. As the player character enters the frame, the camera tracks them past palm trees and a passing pink sports car while the cooling tower looms larger in the periphery. The scene then shifts toward a busy intersection where traffic density increases with vehicles like a green van, moving past a graffiti-covered wall as the industrial tower recedes behind them. Finally, the camera follows the character as they turn right at a green light to climb a steep concrete ramp, moving away from the main street into a more enclosed environment flanked by parked cars and extensive graffiti.
